label: Slaves generator
description: Generates humanlike slave pawns for sale. Only fires for factions whose ideos approve of slavery. Supports optional respect-population-intent gating and a specific pawn kind override.

respectPopulationIntent.label: Respect population intent
respectPopulationIntent.description: If true, generation is probabilistically skipped when the storyteller's population intent is high, reducing slave stock when the colony is well-populated.

slaveKindDef.label: Slave kind def
slaveKindDef.description: PawnKindDef used when generating slave pawns. Defaults to PawnKindDefOf.Slave when absent.
